utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details and costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly health cost. Meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents (home insurance specified; equipment insurance specified) with monthly costs and total property cost. Meets requirement, though 'contents' is implied via standard property coverage; cost details are present. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance plan named with coverage features and cost; includes the specific Scotland trip note and total travel cost. Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: enhancement services are listed with costs marked as included (€0/month). Meets requirement. 5) total_budget: complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, savings vs current, and category breakdown provided. Meets requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are covered and fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact plan name appearing in the ground-truth ratings. For physical health, the plan is 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. For mental health, the plan is 'HealthFirst Standard Mental Health Plan', which matches 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 8. For home insurance, 'HomeFirst Standard Property' aligns with 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 8. For equipment insurance, 'Technology Protection' directly matches the property_enhancement_services item with rating 6. For travel, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' directly matches the mobility_coverage.travel_insurance item with rating 6.
